titleStmt.title: SII 34.423: original edition by Y. Subbarayalu
No. 423. Paḷḷimaḍam, hamlet of Tiruchchuḻi, Aruppukkottai Taluk, Ramanathapuram District. On the north base of the Kālanāthasvāmi temple.

summary.p: This records a gift of 20 sheep for a lamp to a maṭha of the Mahāvratis attached to the temple of Paḷḷipaḍai Sundarapāṇḍiya-Īśvaram in Parittikkuḍi-nāḍu. Three shepherds (āyaṉ) of Maṟukkīḻ in Chōḻa-nāḍu took the sheep in lease for supply of ghee as stipulated.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīcōḻaṉṟalai koṇṭa kōvīra pāṇṭiyarkku yāṇṭu nāṉku Itaṉetir Ēḻu Ivvā
ṇṭu parittikkuṭi nāṭṭu tēvatāṉan tiruccuḻiyal paḷḷipaṭai cuntarapāṇṭiya Īśvarattu
śrīmahāvratikaḷ maṭattiṉukku viḷakku neykku Aṭutta cāvāmūvā pērāṭu Irupatu Ivaṟṟiṉāln
ney cōḷāntaka nāḻiyāl munnāḻi Ivvāṭu koṇṭu Inney Aṭṭuvāṉāyiṉāṉ cōḻanāṭṭu ma
ṟukkīḻ Irukkiṉṟa Āyaṉ tiṇṇāṇiyu maruntiyum kōṭaṉ maṉattāṉum Ineykkum Iva
kaḷukkum puṇai It ruvā ṉācakaṉ nāraṇa nakkaṉ mēṟpaṭiyāṉ Iññāṭṭu peruñcennilakkuṭi pa
ṭaittalaivaṉ pakavaṉukkāka kaikkoṇṭa Āṭu pattu cōḷāntaka nāḻiyāl tiṅkaḷ nāḻin ney Ivaṉu
kku puṇai tārāṉ kōviñcaṉ
Digital edition of SII 34.423 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
